description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using $CI_REGISTRY_USER, $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD and $CI_REGISTRY. Add a build job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, executes docker build --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE . and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE, and pushes the built image to the registry.
